query:
_index=sec_signal 
| timeslice 1d
| toLong(createdTimestamp) as created_timestamp
| min(created_timestamp) as first_seen, max(created_timestamp) as last_seen, count_distinct(_timeslice) as distinct_days_seen by ruleName
| now() - last_seen as days_since_last_signal
| days_since_last_signal/1000/60/60/24 as days_since_last_signal
| formatDate(toLong(first_seen), "yyyy-MM-dd") as first_seen
| formatDate(toLong(last_seen), "yyyy-MM-dd") as last_seen
| order by days_since_last_signal

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides times based metrics for CSE Signals.
